Here is information about a user and a new Digital Music "Encore (Deluxe Edition)" being recommended to the user. For the user, we have the user's review history. For the new item being recommended, we have the item review history by other users.

### User Review History ###
1. Btnhresurrection
Positive Aspects: Solid album, good production, majority of group members featured, some almost classic material
Negative Aspects: Some songs are just okay, one song is skipped
User Preference Elements: Must-have for fans, group members featured prominently, no outside features

2. 9 Lives
Positive Aspects: Tight flow, Best deliveries, Good album, Classic songs
Negative Aspects: Weaker production on some tracks, Different production style than previous albums
User Preference Elements: Underrated MC, Good addition to collection, Features Black Soprano group

3. Infamy
Positive Aspects: High quality beats, Hard-hitting tracks, High quality content, Variety of tracks, Classic songs
Negative Aspects: Some skippable songs, Some average songs, Inconsistent fit with R&B guests
User Preference Elements: High quality content, Variety of tracks, Classic songs, Grimy tracks, Must-have album

4. Thug World Order
Positive Aspects: All 4 members of Bone Thugs-N-Harmony on every song, variety of great songs, skit by Eazy E, good production
Negative Aspects: A couple of mediocre songs, one weak spot, lack of real guest appearances
User Preference Elements: Cohesiveness of group, variety of songs, presence of skits, production quality

5. Truth
Positive Aspects: Strong debut, dark and compelling tales, great songs, features fellow Roc mates and legendary artists, production by multiple talented individuals
Negative Aspects: 2-4 skip-worthy songs, uneven quality throughout the album
User Preference Elements: Real gangsta rap, classic and dark songs, loyalty to authenticity, must-have for fans of the genre

6. The Professional Part II ( explicit)
Positive Aspects: Good number of good songs, Worth picking up, Best tracks are freestyles, Great beat/hard song
Negative Aspects: Clue yelling over the songs, Some skippable songs
User Preference Elements: Mixtape style, Variety of featured rappers, Classic freestyles

7. The Yin and The Yang
Positive Aspects: Good songs, Tight songs, Strong start, Decent production
Negative Aspects: Some skippable songs, Dwindles halfway through, Needs more quality songs
User Preference Elements: Recommended for fans, Wu fans, More quality songs needed

8. Hunger for More (Bonus DVD)
Positive Aspects: Some good songs, solid production, collaborations with Eminem, Young Buck, and The Game
Negative Aspects: Some average songs, repetitive rhymes, not meeting high expectations
User Preference Elements: Expectation vs. Reality, Collaborations with other artists, Production quality

9. Rule 3:36
Positive Aspects: Classic hard gangsta song, Some good tracks, Collaborations with other artists
Negative Aspects: Too many soft R&B tracks, Only 5 out of 13 songs worth listening to
User Preference Elements: Preference for hard rap songs, Dislike for soft rap songs

10. Beg for Mercy
Positive Aspects: Good album, decent production, 2 classic songs
Negative Aspects: Disappointing compared to hype, deteriorating quality
User Preference Elements: Quality, Hype, Classic songs

### Item Review History by other users ###
1. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Appreciation for Eminem, Belief in Eminem's talent, Not elitist snobbish
Negative Aspects: Disappointing album, Not new, Not emotionally open, Forced encore
User Preference Elements: Originality, Emotional depth, Authenticity

2. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Mature and laid-back songs, Clever and witty lyrics, Vintage Shady moments, Autobiographical depictions, Political commentary
Negative Aspects: Inconsistency in quality, Some unnecessary songs, Lack of cleverness in certain tracks
User Preference Elements: Clever and witty lyrics, Consistency in quality, Political commentary, Autobiographical depictions, Value for Money

3. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Wit, Humor, Production
Negative Aspects: Predictability, Lack of Creativity, Mocking Michael Jackson
User Preference Elements: Creativity, Originality, Respectfulness

4. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Great lyrics, Funny, Good variety of songs, Memorable outro
Negative Aspects: Some songs are just okay
User Preference Elements: Humor, Variety, Memorable moments, Lyrics

5. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: None mentioned
Negative Aspects: Lack of good songs, Disappointment, Overuse of dissing Kim
User Preference Elements: Quality of songs, Originality, Variety in content, Value for Money

6. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: None mentioned
Negative Aspects: Poor quality, Disappointing album content, Lack of talent, Lack of respect for hip hop and fans
User Preference Elements: Quality, Talent, Respect for fans, Value for Money

7. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Strong political views on tracks, standout tracks like "Yellow Brick Road", "Mosh", "Like Toy Soldiers", bonus track "We As Americans"
Negative Aspects: Lackluster singles like "Just Lose It", recycled content from previous album
User Preference Elements: Political messaging, originality, album coherence

8. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Beats by Dre production, Eminem's improved skills, well-rounded album, lyrical complexity
Negative Aspects: Familiar subject matter, not as revolutionary as previous albums
User Preference Elements: Innovation, Shock value, Artistic growth, Lyrical complexity

9. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Collaboration with other artists, Poetic lyrics, Excellent sound quality, Good song "Mosh"
Negative Aspects: Lack of intense anger in lyrics, Disappointment for long-time fans
User Preference Elements: Artist experimentation, Talent recognition, Potential for future growth

10. Encore (Deluxe Edition)
Positive Aspects: Catchy Beats, Humorous Tracks, Return of Slim Shady Alter Ego, Top Notch Rap Quality
Negative Aspects: Eminem's Singing, Not as Serious as Previous Albums
User Preference Elements: Humor, Rap Quality, Return of Slim Shady

def get_user_ratings
  ratings = []
  10.times do
    ratings << gets.chomp
  end
  ratings
end

def print_ratings(ratings)
  puts "User Ratings:"
  ratings.each_with_index do |rating, index|
    puts "Rating ##{index + 1}: #{rating}"
  end
end
